title: Add access control for store operators

requirements.text: Implement backend access control so that only the store owner (or an admin) can create, update, and delete products within a specific store. Calls from principals who do not own the store must return an authorization error.
acceptanceCriteria: A store owner can create, update, and delete products for their own store.
A principal who does not own the store receives an authorization error when attempting to create, update, or delete that store's products.
An admin principal can perform all product management operations regardless of store ownership.
Existing query operations (listing products) remain accessible without ownership restriction.

requirements.text: On the frontend, gracefully handle authorization errors returned from the backend for store product operations. Display a user-friendly error message (e.g., toast notification) when an unauthorized action is attempted, rather than crashing or showing a raw error.
acceptanceCriteria: When a store product mutation (create/update/delete) returns an authorization error, a toast notification is shown to the user explaining they do not have permission.
No unhandled exceptions or blank screens appear when an unauthorized operation is attempted.
The StoreProductManager component remains functional after an authorization error.

constraints: All backend logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo).
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new product fields, variants, bundles, or inventory management.
Changing the existing store or product data schema.
